basic_details.job_title: UP Anganwadi Worker Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 119 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Office of the District Programme Officer, Sultanpur, Uttar Pradesh
basic_details.short_information: The Office of the District Programme Officer, Sultanpur (Uttar Pradesh) has issued a public notification inviting online applications for 119 vacant posts of Anganwadi Karyakatri (Anganwadi worker) under the Anganwadi projects operating in the urban and rural areas of Sultanpur district. The recruitment is being carried out on a contract/honorarium basis through a direct recruitment process, as per Government Order No. 2025/3313/58-1-2025 (1917687) dated 17 September 2025 issued by the Principal Secretary, Bal Vikas Seva evam Pushtahar, Uttar Pradesh, Lucknow.

age_limit.details: Note: The notification states the age must not exceed 35 years as on 01 July 2026; it does not mention any age relaxation.

qualification.details: The complete Gram Sabha/ward-wise vacancy list, along with reservation and eligibility details, has been made available at the following locations, in addition to the official website: | District Collectorate, Sultanpur Vikas Bhawan, Sultanpur Concerned Tehsil office Concerned Development Block office Concerned Bal Vikas Pariyojna (Child Development Project) office

selection_process: The notification does not describe a written examination or interview. Selection is based on a merit list prepared from educational qualification marks

exactly as listed in the notification

Widow / legally divorced / abandoned (deserted) woman belonging to a family living below the poverty line (BPL) in the same Gram Sabha/Ward gets the first priority. If no such BPL widow/divorced/abandoned woman candidate is found
women belonging to BPL families in the same Gram Sabha/Ward are given priority. If no BPL candidate (widow/divorced/abandoned or general) is found
widow/divorced/abandoned women living above the poverty line in the same Gram Sabha/Ward are selected. If none of the above are found
women living above the poverty line in the same Gram Sabha/Ward are selected. If still no candidate is found as per the above
women from families living above the poverty line in the same Gram Sabha/Ward are selected from the remaining eligible applicants.
the death certificate issued by the Gram Panchayat Adhikari/concerned Nagar Nikay along with the family register copy will be considered valid proof. For divorced/abandoned (deserted) women
a legal order issued by a competent court will be considered valid proof.
how_to_apply: Visit the official department website: upanganwadibharti.in.
Find and open the online application form for Anganwadi Karyakatri recruitment in the prescribed format.
Fill in all details carefully and sequentially, as required in the form.
Upload self-attested, clean, and legible scanned copies of all required certificates/documents mentioned in the online form.
Enter the correct application number and certificate number for income, caste, and residence certificates (these must be digitally verifiable through the Tehsil).
Review the completed application thoroughly before final submission, since errors can lead to rejection.
Submit the application online on or before the last date - 04 August 2026.
Offline applications, applications sent by post, or any application/document submitted outside the online portal will not be accepted.
important_instructions: As per Government Order No. 1/1092245/2025/3313/58-1-2025 (1917687) dated 17 September 2025, two women from the same family cannot be appointed as Anganwadi Karyakatri and Anganwadi Sahayika at the same Anganwadi centre.

Only female applicants are eligible for these posts. Applicants must reside in the same Gram Sabha/Ward for which they are applying. If any error is found in the application, or if any fact, data, or educational document is found incorrect or forged, the candidature will be cancelled. The applicant is solely responsible for submitting an error-free application. Income, caste, and residence certificates are valid only if they are digitally verifiable through the Tehsil's online system. Two women from the same family cannot hold the Karyakatri and Sahayika posts at the same Anganwadi centre. The last date for online application is 04 August 2026.

content_sections.heading: UP Anganwadi Worker Recruitment 2026 - Quick Overview

rows.information: Office of the District Programme Officer, Sultanpur, Uttar Pradesh
14 Anganwadi projects across Sultanpur district (urban and rural)
District Programme Officer/Child Development Council/Notification/General Correspondence/2026-27

content_sections.heading: Sultanpur Anganwadi Karyakatri Vacancy Details 2026
content_sections.text: The 119 vacancies are distributed across 14 Anganwadi projects in Sultanpur district. The category-wise (Unreserved, OBC, SC) breakup for each project, as published in the notification, is given below. The village/ward-wise breakup and full reservation details for these posts are available at the District Collectorate, Vikas Bhawan, the concerned Tehsil, Development Block, and Bal Vikas Pariyojna office notice boards, as well as on the official website upanganwadibharti.in .

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Only female candidates are eligible to apply for the advertised posts. The candidate must be a resident of the same Gram Sabha (village) or urban Ward for which she is applying for the Anganwadi Karyakatri post.

content_sections.heading: Educational Qualification
content_sections.text: Minimum qualification: Intermediate (12th) or an equivalent qualification. Maximum qualification considered for merit: candidates with qualifications up to postgraduate level will have their marks considered while preparing the merit list.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Note: The notification states the age must not exceed 35 years as on 01 July 2026; it does not mention any age relaxation.

rows.details: Date of birth recorded in the High School mark sheet/certificate will be treated as valid

content_sections.heading: Selection Process and Priority Order
content_sections.text: The notification does not describe a written examination or interview. Selection is based on a merit list prepared from educational qualification marks, combined with a fixed order of social priority for candidates residing in the same Gram Sabha/Ward. The priority order, exactly as listed in the notification, is: Widow / legally divorced / abandoned (deserted) woman belonging to a family living below the poverty line (BPL) in the same Gram Sabha/Ward gets the first priority. If no such BPL widow/divorced/abandoned woman candidate is found, women belonging to BPL families in the same Gram Sabha/Ward are given priority. If no BPL candidate (widow/divorced/abandoned or general) is found, widow/divorced/abandoned women living above the poverty line in the same Gram Sabha/Ward are selected. If none of the above are found, women living above the poverty line in the same Gram Sabha/Ward are selected. If still no candidate is found as per the above, women from families living above the poverty line in the same Gram Sabha/Ward are selected from the remaining eligible applicants. For widow candidates, the death certificate issued by the Gram Panchayat Adhikari/concerned Nagar Nikay along with the family register copy will be considered valid proof. For divorced/abandoned (deserted) women, a legal order issued by a competent court will be considered valid proof.

content_sections.heading: Required Documents
content_sections.text: Based on the notification, applicants should keep the following documents ready for online upload (self-attested, clear, and legible copies): Educational qualification certificates and mark sheets (Intermediate and above, as applicable) High School mark sheet/certificate (for date of birth proof) Income certificate - issued at the competent authority level as per UP Government Revenue Department (Section-9) Order No. 3959/1-9-11-Raj-9 dated 30.09.2011 (or its amendment) Caste certificate (for OBC/SC category claims) Residence/domicile certificate For widow candidates: death certificate of husband issued by the Gram Panchayat Adhikari/Nagar Nikay and family register copy For divorced/abandoned women: relevant legal order issued by a competent court Important: Income, residence, and caste certificates must be digitally signed and verified online through the Tehsil. Only certificates issued in the applicant's own name that can be verified online are valid. The application number and certificate number of these certificates must be entered correctly in the online application; incorrect entries will make the application invalid, and the applicant will be solely responsible for such errors.

content_sections.heading: Important Rule: One Family, One Post
content_sections.text: As per Government Order No. 1/1092245/2025/3313/58-1-2025 (1917687) dated 17 September 2025, two women from the same family cannot be appointed as Anganwadi Karyakatri and Anganwadi Sahayika at the same Anganwadi centre.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for Sultanpur Anganwadi Karyakatri Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Visit the official department website: upanganwadibharti.in . Find and open the online application form for Anganwadi Karyakatri recruitment in the prescribed format. Fill in all details carefully and sequentially, as required in the form. Upload self-attested, clean, and legible scanned copies of all required certificates/documents mentioned in the online form. Enter the correct application number and certificate number for income, caste, and residence certificates (these must be digitally verifiable through the Tehsil). Review the completed application thoroughly before final submission, since errors can lead to rejection. Submit the application online on or before the last date - 04 August 2026. Offline applications, applications sent by post, or any application/document submitted outside the online portal will not be accepted.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: Only female applicants are eligible for these posts. Applicants must reside in the same Gram Sabha/Ward for which they are applying. If any error is found in the application, or if any fact, data, or educational document is found incorrect or forged, the candidature will be cancelled. The applicant is solely responsible for submitting an error-free application. Income, caste, and residence certificates are valid only if they are digitally verifiable through the Tehsil's online system. Two women from the same family cannot hold the Karyakatri and Sahayika posts at the same Anganwadi centre. The last date for online application is 04 August 2026.

content_sections.heading: Where to Verify Full Vacancy and Eligibility Details
content_sections.text: The complete Gram Sabha/ward-wise vacancy list, along with reservation and eligibility details, has been made available at the following locations, in addition to the official website: District Collectorate, Sultanpur Vikas Bhawan, Sultanpur Concerned Tehsil office Concerned Development Block office Concerned Bal Vikas Pariyojna (Child Development Project) office

faq.question: Q1. How many vacancies are there in Sultanpur Anganwadi Karyakatri Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 119 vacancies for the post of Anganwadi Karyakatri across 14 Anganwadi projects in Sultanpur district.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for Sultanpur Anganwadi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submitting the online application is 04 August 2026.

faq.question: Q3. Who is eligible to apply for the Anganwadi Karyakatri post in Sultanpur?
faq.answer: Only female candidates who are residents of the same Gram Sabha or Ward, aged between 18 and 35 years as on 01 July 2026, with a minimum qualification of Intermediate, are eligible to apply.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for Anganwadi Karyakatri?
faq.answer: The minimum required qualification is Intermediate (12th) or an equivalent qualification. Marks up to postgraduate level are considered for merit.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for Anganwadi Karyakatri recruitment in Sultanpur?
faq.answer: The minimum age is 18 years and the maximum age is 35 years as on 01 July 2026.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for Sultanpur Anganwadi Karyakatri Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online only, through the official website upanganwadibharti.in. Offline or postal applications are not accepted.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any application fee amount.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary or honorarium for Anganwadi Worker?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify a salary or honorarium amount. It only confirms the post is contract-based and honorarium-based.
